description: Structured source access guide for SkillPilot source-specific searchers.

sources.search_method: Fetch marketplace JSON and match query terms against plugin collection names, descriptions, and nested skills paths.

result_mapping.title: skills[] basename or plugins[].name
result_mapping.url: resolved GitHub tree URL for the skill path

sources.detail_reading: Read each matched skill path, especially SKILL.md, before creating candidates.
risk_notes: Official source, but scripts/resources in individual skills still need review.
sources.failure_handling: If the marketplace JSON cannot be fetched or parsed, return a failed source result and continue with other sources.

sources.search_method: Fetch markdown documentation and match query terms against headings and paragraphs.
sources.detail_reading: Use this source as normative documentation and policy context, not as a standalone installable candidate.
risk_notes: Documentation source only; should not be ranked as an installable extension.
sources.failure_handling: If the markdown URL fails, record the source failure and continue.

sources.search_method: Fetch GitHub Contents API for the skills directory and match query terms against directory names, file paths, and README fallback text.
sources.detail_reading: Read README or notebook summaries for matched examples; mark as examples/tutorials.
risk_notes: Cookbook examples are reference material, not a complete marketplace.
sources.failure_handling: If GitHub Contents API fails, fetch the README markdown fallback.

sources.search_method: Call SkillsMP keyword search API and convert returned GitHub-backed skill hits into provisional search results.
sources.detail_reading: Read the returned GitHub source before creating candidates.
risk_notes: Community discovery source; SkillsMP indexes public GitHub sources and does not certify safety.
sources.failure_handling: On API errors or rate limits, record failure and continue with official Skill sources.

sources.search_method: Fetch registry servers JSON and match query terms against server name, title, description, repository, packages, and remotes.

result_mapping.title: server.title or server.name
result_mapping.url: server.repository.url or server.websiteUrl or first remote url

sources.detail_reading: Read registry entry and linked repository/package metadata before recommending installation.
risk_notes: Official registry is preview; remote servers and package transports still require review.
sources.failure_handling: Record schema or availability failures and continue with community registries.

sources.search_method: Fetch public API results and match query terms against name, namespace, description, repository URL, attributes, and tools.
sources.detail_reading: Use Glama as enrichment and cross-check against official registry or GitHub.
risk_notes: Community registry; trust should be lower than official registry.
sources.failure_handling: Record API failure and continue with official registry and Smithery.

sources.search_method: Fetch Smithery servers JSON and match query terms against displayName, qualifiedName, namespace, description, homepage, verified and remote fields.
sources.detail_reading: Preserve hosted, remote, verified, deployed, useCount, and bySmithery fields as convenience/trust signals.
risk_notes: Commercial hosted registry; Smithery verification is not MCP official verification.
sources.failure_handling: If query parameters are unsupported, fetch default page and filter locally.

sources.search_method: Fetch marketplace JSON and match query terms against plugin name, description, category, keywords, homepage, and source metadata.
sources.detail_reading: Read plugin source directory or plugin manifest before candidate creation.
risk_notes: Hooks, MCP servers, local executables, npm packages, and unpinned external sources should raise risk.
sources.failure_handling: Return failed result for fetch/parse errors and continue with other plugin sources.

sources.search_method: Fetch large marketplace JSON, filter entries locally, and resolve details only for matching plugins.
sources.detail_reading: Cache by SHA/ETag in future work; read matched plugin details before recommending.
risk_notes: Official community index can point to external repositories; verify each source.
sources.failure_handling: Record fetch/parse failure and continue with official/demo/community sources.

sources.search_method: Fetch demo marketplace JSON and match query terms against bundled plugin names, descriptions, categories, and source paths.

result_mapping.title: name
result_mapping.url: resolved GitHub tree URL under the claude-code repository

sources.detail_reading: Use as format reference and test fixture; read plugin directory under plugins/ before candidate creation.
risk_notes: Demo/example entries should not outrank official or strong community evidence unless clearly relevant.

sources.search_method: Fetch marketplace JSON and match query terms against plugin entries; use README categories only as supplemental tags in future work.
sources.detail_reading: Resolve local source paths such as ./plugins/<name> and read detail files before candidate creation.
risk_notes: Community index; require stronger evidence before direct recommendation.
sources.failure_handling: Record fetch/parse failure and continue with official sources.
